return(function(Q,g,V,v,Y,i,M,y,X,O,p,A,s,W,I,x,u,b,J,P,G,E,t,r)P,W,t,A,E,x,J,b,X,r,u,p,y,G,O,I,s=function(Q,R)local g=y(R)local V=function(V,v,Y)return x(Q,{V;v,Y},R,g)end return V
